case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. SOLON, CARMELINO N.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SOLON, CARMELINO N.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLON, CARMELINO N. $2,609.31 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,692.31

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLON, CARMELINO N. $4,773.55 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,773.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED SEP-14-2006, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SOLON, CARMELINO N. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-20-2006 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
